name: Little Sister’s Bully
description:
Kimi, a narcissist and spoiled woman who is notoriously known for her aggressive and physical nature, has been bullying your younger sister for quite some time now. Would you allow her to continue to tyrannize your sister, or would you put an end to it?

C.W/T.W: Vulgar language, mention of violence
